summary:
Breastfeeding is a clinically supported method for alleviating procedural pain in neonates; it has been validated through multiple studies showing its effectiveness when compared directly against other methods like oral sucrose. The presence of explicit recommendations from authoritative medical literature confirms this benefit beyond mere anecdotal support.\boxed{Yes}

The summary focuses only on the core clinical rationale without including any external commentary or irrelevant details.
